fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code that identifies the filter record.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of filter combinations in the Source Document Filter Card window to retrieve lines from source documents.

fields.name: Item No. Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Variant Code Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item variant used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer No. Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sell-to customer number used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Buy-from Vendor No. Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the buy-from vendor number used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Customer No. Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies which customers are included when you use the Filters to Get Source Docs. window to retrieve source document lines.

fields.name: Planned Delivery Date Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the planned delivery date that is used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipment method code used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipping agent code used to filter the source documents.

fields.name: Shipping Advice Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies which shipping advice is used for the current filter card.

fields.name: Do Not Fill Qty. to Handle
fields.tooltip: Specifies that inventory quantities are assigned when you get outbound source document lines for shipment.

fields.name: Show Filter Request
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the Filters to Get Source Docs. window appears when you choose Use Filters to Get Source Docs on a warehouse shipment or receipt.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipping agent service used to filter the source documents.

fields.name: In-Transit Code Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the in-transit code used to filter the source documents.

fields.name: Transfer-from Code Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the transfer-from code used to filter the source documents.

fields.name: Transfer-to Code Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the transfer-to code used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Planned Shipment Date Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the due date that is used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Planned Receipt Date Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the planned receipt date that is used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Expected Receipt Date Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expected receipt date that is used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Shipment Date Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number or number range that is used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Receipt Date Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number or number range that is used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Sales Shipment Date Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipment date that is used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Source No. Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number, or number range, that is used to filter the source documents to get.

fields.name: Source Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies which type of source document the current filter card is used for.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies which type of transaction the current filter card is used for. The options are Outbound and Inbound.

fields.name: Sales Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies that sales orders are retrieved when you choose Use Filters to Get Src. Docs in the Warehouse Shipment window.

fields.name: Sales Return Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies that sales return orders are retrieved when you choose Use Filters to Get Src. Docs in the Warehouse Shipment window.

fields.name: Purchase Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies that purchase orders are retrieved when you choose Use Filters to Get Src. Docs in the Warehouse Receipt window.

fields.name: Purchase Return Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies that purchase return orders are retrieved when you choose Use Filters to Get Src. Docs in the Warehouse Shipment window.

fields.name: Inbound Transfers
fields.tooltip: Specifies that inbound transfer orders are retrieved when you choose Use Filters to Get Src. Docs in the Warehouse Receipt.

fields.name: Outbound Transfers
fields.tooltip: Specifies that outbound transfer orders are retrieved when you choose Use Filters to Get Src. Docs in the Warehouse Shipment window.

fields.name: Partial
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Shipping Advice field on sales orders must contain Partial when you choose Use Filters to Get Src. Docs.

fields.name: Complete
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Shipping Advice field on sales orders must contain Complete when you choose Use Filters to Get Src. Docs.

fields.name: Planned Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the planned delivery date that is used as a filter in the current filter card.

fields.name: Planned Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the planned shipment date that is used as a filter in the current filter card.

fields.name: Planned Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the planned receipt date that is used as a filter in the current filter card.

fields.name: Expected Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expected receipt date that is used as a filter in the current source document filter card.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipment date that is used as a filter in the current filter card.

fields.name: Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the receipt date that is used as a filter in the current filter card.

fields.name: Sales Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sales shipment date that is used as a filter in the current filter card.
